name: OPPENHEIMER HOLDINGS INC
summary: Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. is a middle-market investment bank and full-service broker-dealer incorporated in Delaware. Through subsidiaries including Oppenheimer & Co., OAM, Oppenheimer Trust, and OPY Credit, it provides retail securities brokerage, institutional sales and trading, investment banking, equity and fixed income research, market-making, trust services, and investment advisory and asset management services. As of December 31, 2025, the firm held $143.3 billion in client assets under administration and $55.2 billion in AUM.

products.name: Full-Service Brokerage
products.description: Covers equities, debt securities, options, municipal bonds, mutual funds, ETFs, precious metals, and unit investment trusts.

products.name: Wealth Planning
products.description: Includes asset management, retirement solutions, insurance, annuities, IRAs, 401(k) plans, and trust/fiduciary services.

products.name: Margin Lending
products.description: Extends credit to customers collateralized by securities and cash in customer accounts.

products.name: Separately Managed Accounts
products.description: Unified Managed Account and Strategic Asset Review dual contract program for fee-based portfolio management.

products.name: Mutual Fund Managed Accounts (PAS)
products.description: Three fee-based programs: PAS Flex, PAS Directed, and PAS Research for mutual fund portfolio construction.

products.name: Discretionary Advisory Accounts (Omega/Alpha)
products.description: Client-focused discretionary fee-based investment programs managed by Oppenheimer financial advisors.

products.name: Non-Discretionary Advisory Accounts (Preference Program)
products.description: Fee-based non-discretionary investment advisory services and consultation to clients.

products.name: Alternative Investments
products.description: Hedge funds, fund of funds, private equity funds, and late-stage private equity for high-net-worth and institutional investors.

products.name: Portfolio Enhancement Program
products.description: Sells uncovered out-of-the-money puts and calls on S&P 500 Index for qualified option investors.

products.name: Investment Banking
products.description: Strategic advisory and capital markets services including M&A, ECM, DCM, debt advisory, restructuring, and fund placement.

products.name: Equity Research
products.description: 36 senior analysts covering approximately 675 equity securities primarily listed in the U.S.

products.name: Public Finance
products.description: Capital raising for state/local governments, public agencies, nonprofits through municipal bond underwriting and related services.

products.name: Private Market Opportunities
products.description: Sourcing private investments across early stage, late stage, co-investments, funds, and secondary market transactions.

products.name: OPY Credit
products.description: Secondary trading of loans and trade claims primarily on a riskless principal basis.

products.name: Trust Services (Oppenheimer Trust)
products.description: Trust and fiduciary services provided through Oppenheimer Trust Company of Delaware Inc., a Delaware limited purpose bank.
